required_tables.commit: Validation rules for GPU hardware counters (rocm_counter_collection)

validation_queries.description: Check that GPU HW counter metadata was registered
validation_queries.error_message: No GPU HW counter info entries found
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table_name} WHERE target_arch = 'GPU' AND name LIKE 'GPU %'

required_tables.commit: Validation rules for GPU hardware counter events

validation_queries.description: Check that GPU HW counter events exist in rocpd_pmc_event
validation_queries.error_message: No GPU HW counter event rows found
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'GPU %'

validation_queries.description: Check that GPU HW counter end-of-event zero markers exist (each counter interval must close with value=0)
validation_queries.error_message: No zero-value end markers found for GPU HW counters — counter intervals are not properly closed
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'GPU %' AND event.value = 0.0

validation_queries.description: Check that GPU HW counter non-zero values exist (actual counter measurements)
validation_queries.error_message: No non-zero counter values found — counters may not be recording
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'GPU %' AND event.value > 0.0

validation_queries.description: Check that every non-zero counter event has a matching zero end marker (paired start/end)
validation_queries.error_message: Mismatch between non-zero counter events and zero end markers — some counter intervals are not closed
validation_queries.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'GPU %' AND event.value > 0.0) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name LIKE 'GPU %' AND event.value = 0.0) as count
